MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-13-2019 Vacated

PRO HAC VICE RENEWAL FEE STATUS FOR ATTORNEY ROBERTA A. KAPLAN
Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed (Sweep)

PRO HAC VICE RENEWAL FEE STATUS FOR ATTORNEY GABRIELLE E. TENZER
Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed (Sweep)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Set For Trial On Jul-22-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Julia Stethanides, Esq. 415-638-8800 of Outten & Golden LLP for Plaintiff Ingrid Avendano through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s APPLICATON OF GABRIELLE E. TENZER TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Defendant Uber Technologies, Inc.'s application for the pro hac vice admission of Gabrielle Tenzer is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Julia Stethanides, Esq. 415-638-8800 of Outten & Golden LLP for Plaintiff Ingrid Avendano through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. VERIFIED APPLICATION OF ROBERTA A. KAPLAN TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Defendant Uber Technologies, Inc.'s application for the pro hac vice admission of Roberta Kaplan is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
